name: Value my case with surgery and 3 months off in Farmington UT?
description: Medicals + 66% wages + disability rating; case review needed.[1]

mainEntity.name: Value my case with surgery and 3 months off in Farmington UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicals + 66% wages + disability rating; case review needed.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Includes full medicals/surgery, wage loss, potential impairment; third-party adds more.[1][4] Exact via rating.[1] Key factors: (1) 66% wages during off; (2) Permanent partial schedule; (3) Light duty reduces; (4) Aggravation if prior.[1] Track bills/wages, get rating. Often $10k-$100k+ depending.
